description_long: This object is a stylized, futuristic airplane with a compact fuselage and sharply angled wings that extend outward and slightly downward, giving it an aggressive, high-performance appearance. The wings are mid-mounted and feature pronounced anhedral angles, with additional winglets or fins at the tips. The airplane is predominantly light blue with accents of purple, orange, and gray, and it has two large, cylindrical jet engines mounted under each wing, suggesting significant thrust capability. The nose is pointed and streamlined, while the rear features a cluster of exhaust nozzles and a vertical stabilizer integrated into the fuselage. The cockpit is positioned at the front of the fuselage and appears to be enclosed with a tinted canopy. The overall design is reminiscent of a science fiction or advanced military aircraft, with angular surfaces and a sleek, aerodynamic profile.
description: A futuristic, angular airplane with mid-mounted swept wings, twin underwing jet engines, and a pointed nose, finished in blue, purple, and orange tones. The design features a compact fuselage, enclosed forward cockpit, and pronounced winglets.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed nose, forward cockpit canopy, and twin cylindrical jet engines under the wings.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sharply swept, anhedral wings, engine placement, and the compact, angular fuselage.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the clustered exhaust nozzles, winglets, and the vertical stabilizer integrated into the fuselage.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the wing's downward angle, engine structure, and the streamlined body.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with sharply swept, anhedral wings and prominent winglets at the tips.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted under each wing.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer integrated into the rear fuselage.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Not visibly present in the images.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single canopy.
